text: masa nineve sefer chazovn nachum haeleqoshi
el qanov venoqem yehva noqem yehva uva'al chema noqem yehva letsarayv venovter hu leoyevayv
yehova erekh apayim ugedovl kh ugedal-kocha q venaqe lo yenaqe yehva besufa uvise'ara darekov ve'anan avaq ragelayv
gov'er bayam vayabeshehu vekhal-haneharovt hecheriv umelal bashan vekharemel uferach levanovn umelal
harim ra'ashu mimenu vehageva'ovt hitemogagu vatisa haarets mipanayv vetevel vekhal-yoshevey vah
lifeney za'emov mi ya'amovd umi yaqum bacharovn apov chamatov nitekha khaesh vehatsurim nitetsu mimenu
tovv yehva lema'ovz beyovm tsara veyode'a chosey vov
uveshetef 'over kala ya'ase meqovmah veoyevayv yeradef-choshekh ׃
mah-techashevun el-yehva kala hu 'ose lo-taqum pa'amayim tsara
ki 'ad-sirim sevukhim ukhesaveam sevuim ukelu keqash yavesh male
mimekh yatsa choshev 'al-yehva ra'a yo'ets beliya'al s
ko ׀ amar yehva im-shelemim vekhen rabim vekhen nagozu ve'avar ve'initikh lo a'anekh 'ovd
ve'ata eshebor motehu me'alayikh umovserotayikh anateq
vetsiva 'aleykha yehva lo-yizara' mishimekha 'ovd mibeyt eloheykha akherit pesel umasekha asim qiverekha ki qalovta f
hine 'al-heharim rageley mevaser mashemi'a shalovm chagi yehuda chagayikh shalemi nedarayikh ki lo yovsif 'ovd la'avovr kh la'avar-bakh q beliya'al kulo nikherat
'ala mefits 'al-panayikh natsovr metsura tsapeh-derekh chazeq matenayim amets kocha meod
ki shav yehva et-geovn ya'aqov kigeovn yiserael ki veqaqum boqeqim uzemoreyhem shichetu
magen giboreyhu meadam aneshey-chayil metula'im beesh-peladovt harekhev beyovm hakhinov vehaberoshim hare'alu
bachutsovt yitehovlelu harekhev yishetaqeshequn barechovovt mareeyhen kalapidim kaberaqim yerovtsetsu
yizekor adirayv yikashelu vahalikhovtam kh bahalikhatam q yemaharu chovmatah vehukhan hasokhekh
sha'arey haneharovt nifetachu vehaheykhal namovg
vehutsav guleta ho'alata veamehoteyha menahagovt keqovl yovnim metofefot 'al-livevehen
venineve khiverekhat-mayim mimey hi vehema nasim 'imedu 'amodu veeyn mafene
bozu khesef bozu zahav veeyn qetse latekhuna kavod mikol keli chemeda
buqa umevuqa umevulaqa velev names ufiq birekayim vechalechala bekhal-matenayim ufeney khulam qibetsu farur
aye me'ovn arayovt umire'e hu lakefirim asher halakh areye lavi sham gur areye veeyn macharid
areye toref bedey gorovtayv umechaneq leliveotayv vayemale-teref chorayv ume'onotayv terefa
hineni elayikh neum yehva tsevaovt vehive'areti ve'ashan rikhebah ukhefirayikh tokhal charev vehikherati meerets tarepekh velo-yishama' 'ovd qovl maleakhekhe s
hovy 'ir damim kulah kachash pereq melea lo yamish taref
qovl shovt veqovl ra'ash ovfan vesus doher umerekava meraqeda
parash ma'ale velahav cherev uveraq chanit verov chalal vekhoved pager veeyn qetse lageviya yikheshelu kh vekhashelu q bigeviyatam
merov zenuney zovna tovvat chen ba'alat keshafim hamokheret govyim bizenuneyha umishepachovt bikheshafeyha
hineni elayikh neum yehva tsevaovt vegileyti shulayikh 'al-panayikh vehareeyti govyim ma'erekh umamelakhovt qelovnekh
vehishelakheti 'alayikh shiqutsim venibaletikh vesametikh keroi
vehaya khal-roayikh yidovd mimekh veamar shadeda nineve mi yanud lah meayin avaqesh menachamim lakh
hateytevi mino amovn hayosheva bayeorim mayim saviv lah asher-cheyl yam miyam chovmatah
kush 'atsema umitserayim veeyn qetse put veluvim hayu be'ezeratekh
gam-hi lagola halekha vashevi gam 'olaleyha yeruteshu berosh kal-chutsovt ve'al-nikhebadeyha yadu govral vekhal-gedovleyha rutequ vaziqim
gam-at tishekeri tehi na'alama gam-at tevaqeshi ma'ovz meovyev
kal-mivetsarayikh teenim 'im-bikurim im-yinov'u venafelu 'al-pi ovkhel
hine 'amekh nashim beqirebekh leoyevayikh patovcha nifetechu sha'arey aretsekh akhela esh berichayikh
mey matsovr shaavi-lakh chazeqi mivetsarayikh boi vatit verimesi vachomer hachaziqi maleben
m tokhelekh esh takheritekh cherev tokhelekh kayaleq hitekabed kayeleq hitekabedi kaarebe
hirebeyt rokhelayikh mikovkhevey hashamayim yeleq pashat vaya'of
minezarayikh kaarebe vetafeserayikh kegovv govay hachovnim bagederovt beyovm qara shemesh zarecha venovdad velo-novda' meqovmov ayam
namu ro'eykha melekh ashur yishekenu adireykha nafoshu 'amekha 'al-heharim veeyn meqabets
eyn-keha leshiverekha nachela makatekha kol ׀ shome'ey shime'akha taqe'u khaf 'aleykha ki 'al-mi lo-'avera ra'atekha tamid
